analysis: This race is big time wide open. Of the three horses I like with the best chance to win, Prom Queen has the least amount of question marks for me so we will ride with her. Counting Stars is a volatile horse but if we get her best she could win too. The only issue I have with Zany is her not keeping her head down at the start of the final stretch which hurts her momentum.
betting_plays:
Win — Prom Queen
Place — Counting Stars

Exacta box and Trifecta box Prom Queen, Counting Stars, and Zany (6 ways)

Superfecta:
Prom Queen, Counting Stars, Zany / Explora, Meaning / Prom Queen, Counting Stars, Zany / Explora, Meaning (12 ways I think)
